articles.author: Kevin Crowley, David Wethe, Annmarie Hordern
articles.title: Big Oil CEOs Warn Energy Market Is Moving Closer to Cliff’s Edge - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: America’s biggest oil companies are warning that global crude markets may be nearing an inflection point of higher prices the longer the Strait of Hormuz stays closed.
articles.content:
Americas biggest oil companies are warning that global crude markets may be nearing an inflection point of higher prices the longer the Strait of Hormuz stays closed.
